sourceName: U.S. Census ACS 2024 5-Year Housing Characteristics - Greater Seattle Counties
notes: Official U.S. Census ACS 2020-2024 5-year Data Profile DP04 aggregate county estimates. Covers housing units, occupancy, vacancy, tenure, median home value, and median gross rent for King, Pierce, and Snohomish counties. No individual addresses, names, devices, or household-level records are imported.
